app.title: FoodGuardian AI - Smart Recipe Assistant
app.subtitle: Your Personal Nutrition & Eco-Friendly Cooking Guide

home.welcome_subtitle: Smart Recipes + Eco Quantification, Make Family Dining Greener 🌍
home.profile_subtitle: Set a nickname, we'll quietly track every saving on your device.
home.population_subtitle: Different groups have different nutritional intake standards
home.eco_contribution_subtitle: Data is counted only on this device and can be reset anytime.
home.daily_recommendation_subtitle: AI generates personalized dietary suggestions based on your nutrition status and fridge ingredients
home.food_weight_query_subtitle: 💡 Enter food name to query approximate weight of common foods (helps you estimate intake)
home.intake_record_subtitle: Please enter the weight (grams) of various foods you've consumed today
home.today_overview_subtitle: 💡 Tip: You can directly modify intake data in the table, supports deleting individual records
home.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this record?

recipe.title: Smart Recipe Generator
recipe.subtitle: Select the number of diners and ingredients, we'll recommend the perfect portions for you.
recipe.no_ingredients: Please enter at least one ingredient
recipe.appetite_subtitle: If your family members have larger or smaller appetites, you can adjust the base portion factor.
recipe.generation_progress_subtitle: Automatic nutrition assessment after every 3 generations
recipe.impact_subtitle: Data based on average conversion coefficients from FAO and Water Footprint Network public research.

nutrition.title: Nutrition Assessment
nutrition.ai_analysis_subtitle: AI-driven nutrient detection and health impact assessment
nutrition.input_label: Please enter the name of an ingredient or a recipe
nutrition.input_placeholder: Please enter the name of an ingredient or a recipe. e.g., Braised beef with potatoes, Scrambled eggs with tomatoes.

fridge.title: Smart Fridge
fridge.subtitle: Record fridge ingredients to prevent spoilage and waste.
fridge.management_subtitle: Record fridge ingredients to prevent spoilage and waste.
fridge.name_placeholder: The name of an ingredient e.g., Tomato

common.ai_service_error: AI service temporarily unavailable, please try again later
common.confirm_reset: Are you sure you want to reset all local eco statistics? This action cannot be undone.
common.ingredient_required: Please enter at least one ingredient

common.recording_too_short: Recording too short, please record again

common.auto_intake_progress: 🎉 3rd meal recipe generated, auto-recording and performing nutrition assessment...
common.input_dishes_required: Please enter the dishes you want

common.select_image_first: ❌ Please select an image or take a photo first
common.recognition_completed_confirm: ✅ Recognition successful, please confirm or edit ingredients
common.mic_not_supported: ❌ Your browser does not support recording

🔴 Recording, please speak... (max 30 seconds)

Click [✅ Confirm] to end early
common.recognition_no_result: ⚠️ Could not recognize ingredients, please enter manually
common.welcome_back_message: Welcome back, {name}! Let's save a little bit of resources for the Earth today.
common.ai_recognition_complete: ✅ AI recognition complete! Please check the ingredient list above. If inaccurate, you can manually edit, then click "Confirm and Record Intake Data" button.

❌ Network error: {error}

Please check:
1. Server is running
2. Network connection is normal
3. API key is valid

common.meal_intake_recorded: ✅ Meal {num} recorded: Vegetables {veg}g, Fruits {fru}g, Meat {meat}g, Eggs {egg}g
common.error_audio_too_large: Audio file too large, please record audio under 25MB
common.error_network: Network connection failed, please check network and retry

chat.title: 🤖 AI Chat Assistant
chat.subtitle: Have any questions about recipes, nutrition, or cooking? Feel free to ask me any questions about recipes, nutrition, or cooking!
chat.assistant_subtitle: Feel free to ask me any questions about recipes, nutrition, or cooking!

camera.subtitle: Upload food image, AI automatically recognizes

camera.edit_hint: 💡 Tip: If recognition is inaccurate, you can manually edit, separate with commas
camera.modal_subtitle: Upload food image, AI automatically recognizes
camera.upload_hint_title: Click to upload or drag image here
camera.edit_hint: 💡 Tip: If recognition is inaccurate, you can manually edit, separate with commas

voice.ai_thinking: 🤖 AI is thinking about your question, please wait...

shopping.title: Smart Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: What dishes do you want to eat? AI helps you generate shopping list
